texto: I no longer have the energy for meaningless friendships, forced interactions or unnecessary conversations. If we don’t vibrate on the same frequency there’s just no reason for us to waste our time. I’d rather have no one and wait for substance than to not feel someone and fake the funk.
explicacao: Citação de Joquesse Eugenia sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I no longer have the energy for meaningless friendships, forced interactions or unnecessary conve…” articula amizade, friends, life-lessons em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e amizade.

frase_original: I no longer have the energy for meaningless friendships, forced interactions or unnecessary conversations. If we don’t vibrate on the same frequency there’s just no reason for us to waste our time. I’d rather have no one and wait for substance than to not feel someone and fake the funk.
